news.headline: Shannon Lazare appointed as M&T Bank's New Jersey Regional President to lead growth and community engagement. #MTB
news.summary: Experienced banker, Shannon Lazare, has been named as the New Jersey Regional President of M&T Bank. This announcement was made on December 5, 2024, by M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB). Shannon's role will involve overseeing the bank's operations in New Jersey, focusing on driving growth and enhancing community outreach efforts in the region.

news.headline: Mantle introduces Mantle Portal, a platform for LPs to simplify private investment management.
news.summary: Toronto-based company Mantle has officially launched Mantle Portal, an innovative platform aimed at simplifying private investment management for Limited Partners (LPs). Designed to enhance efficiency and streamline processes, Mantle Portal is set to revolutionize the way LPs handle private investments.

news.headline: OpenEye appoints Eric Moe as VP of North American Sales, bringing expertise in security industry and cloud technologies.
news.summary: OpenEye, a prominent provider of cloud-based video security solutions, has announced the appointment of Eric Moe as the new Vice President of North American Sales. Bringing in-depth experience in the security sector, Moe has worked extensively with video and cloud technologies, having previously collaborated with Milestone Systems and Genea Access Control. In his role, Moe will oversee the sales team responsible for supporting OpenEye partners and customers across North America.

news.headline: PCI-SIG announced 1,000 member companies worldwide for PCIe standard. A milestone achievement.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, the organization PCI-SIG, known for establishing the widely used PCIe standard, revealed today that it has achieved a milestone of 1,000 members.

news.headline: Okta remains Leader for the eighth time in Gartner's Access Management Magic Quadrant for 2024.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Okta, Inc. (NASDAQ: OKTA), a prominent independent Identity partner, has been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Access Management for the eighth year in a row. Gartner defines access management (AM) as tools encompassing authentication and single sign-on (SSO) features. AM tools like those offered by Okta establish, regulate, and enforce access controls during operation for modern systems. A complimentary version of the complete Gartner report can be accessed for more insights.

news.headline: Smartsheet named Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management, excelling in Ability to Execute.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Smartsheet, an AI-enhanced enterprise-grade work management platform, was recognized as a Leader in the 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management (CWM). This marks the second consecutive year that Smartsheet achieved the highest ranking in Ability to Execute among all vendors. The assessment of being a Leader was determined by analyzing the company’s Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The report highlighted the rapid growth of the CWM market.

news.headline: Amperity appoints Rob Ferguson as new CRO, with 20 years of experience, to accelerate company’s market momentum.
news.summary: In Seattle, a leading AI-powered customer data cloud company, Amperity, has named Rob Ferguson as its new Chief Revenue Officer. Ferguson, with a vast experience of more than 20 years in expanding go-to-market organizations, is expected to boost the company's market momentum. His role will involve aiding enterprise brands in converting intricate customer data into tangible business value. CEO Tony Owens expressed optimism in Ferguson's leadership abilities stating, "I’m incredibly excited and confident in Rob's leadership as we enter our next phase of growth as a company."

news.headline: Emergence AI launches autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for enterprise efficiency at the intersection of AI and distributed systems.
news.summary: Emergence AI has introduced a new enterprise-grade multi-agent orchestrator in New York. This autonomous meta-agent is built to plan, execute, verify, and iterate in real-time. Operating at the convergence of AI and distributed systems, the orchestrator harnesses autonomous agents to perceive their surroundings, strategize tasks, analyze intricate situations, act independently to complete those tasks, and verify results. This launch marks an innovative step in leveraging cutting-edge technology to enhance operational efficiency.

news.headline: Disneyland Resort to mark 70th anniversary in 2025 with festivities starting May 16, including 'Paint the Night' parade returning. New 'World of Color Happiness!' show to debut.
news.summary: The 70th Celebration at Disneyland Resort kicks off on May 16, 2025, featuring the comeback of the popular 'Paint the Night' parade and the premiere of the new 'World of Color Happiness!' show. Families can enjoy a plethora of fun activities spread across two theme parks, the Downtown Disney District, and three hotels, making Disneyland Resort an ideal multi-day vacation spot. This special event offers limited-time entertainment for visitors of all ages.

news.headline: Bitcoin surpassed $100,000, post-2024 election highs. Economist Peter Schiff's skepticism addressed; tweet got mixed reactions.
news.summary: Bitcoin, the leading cryptocurrency, reached a new high on Wednesday, December 4, surpassing the $100,000 mark. This achievement is part of a series of record highs the crypto has achieved since the 2024 presidential election. Many investors and analysts within the cryptocurrency space celebrated this significant milestone. Economist Peter Schiff expressed his opinion on the achievement, criticizing Bitcoin's reliance on government support to reach this milestone. Schiff's comments sparked a discussion among users, with some highlighting the historical impact of government intervention on the crypto market. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Agrovision enters premium cherry production by acquiring ZurGroup in Chile, expanding global presence.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Agrovision, a prominent vertically integrated global superfruit platform, revealed their expansion to premium cherry production with the debut of Agrovision Chile. This move, facilitated by acquiring the well-established Chilean grower and exporter ZurGroup, signifies a significant enhancement to Agrovision's superfruit product range and dedication to fulfilling its goal of sparking consumer delight and promoting healthy snacking through technology. By capitalizing on Chile's ideal cultivation settings, Agrovision aims to leverage this new venture for growth.

news.headline: Who is profiting from the crypto boom? The ones benefiting most are enabling investors to gamble amid volatile swings.
news.summary: Investors are currently caught up in the volatility of the crypto market, where significant gains and losses are common. However, those truly benefiting are the individuals and platforms providing investors with opportunities to engage in speculation.

news.headline: Tractor Supply reveals Life Out Here 2030 strategy at Investor Day, marking next growth phase. $TSCO, US's largest rural retailer.
news.summary: BRENTWOOD, Tenn.-- Tractor Supply Company, the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the US, will unveil its Life Out Here 2030 plan at its Investment Community Day today. This strategy outlines the company's future growth initiatives. Over the past five years, Tractor Supply has shown robust financial results and strengthened its competitive position through various endeavors. Tractor Supply Company is listed on NASDAQ as TSCO and is set to reveal their long-term vision for continued success.

news.headline: AuditBoard named to 2024 Best Workplaces for Parents List by Fortune Media & Great Place To Work. Over 635,000 employee survey responses analyzed.
news.summary: AuditBoard has been recognized as one of the top workplaces for parents in the United States by Great Place To Work® and Fortune magazine for the first time. The company has been selected for the 2024 Fortune Best Workplaces™ for Parents List, solidifying its position as a desirable employer for individuals with parenting responsibilities. This accolade is based on an analysis of survey responses from more than 635,000 employees. AuditBoard's inclusion on this list highlights its commitment to fostering a supportive and inclusive work environment for parents.

news.headline: TRON dominance emphasized amid South Korea martial law declaration; TRON surged from 200 to 650 KRW - analyst.
news.summary: A significant surge was observed in Tron's buying activity in a single day, with the cryptocurrency rallying from a low of 200 KRW to a high of 650 KRW. This shift showcased aggressive trading behavior, according to the analyst.

news.headline: PHAXIAM Therapeutics reports total voting rights and shares in share capital on November 29, 2024.
Roshan Rahnama joins Avalere Health as EVP, leading innovative market access marketing offering.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Roshan Rahnama has been appointed as the Executive Vice President at Avalere Health, a leading global strategic partner for the biopharmaceutical field. In this role, Rahnama will spearhead the development of an innovative interdisciplinary market access marketing service. This new offering by Avalere Health aims to combine various strategies and insights to cater to the growing needs of the industry.

news.headline: AIFS recommends study abroad as a gift with meaningful impact for college-age loved ones.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on December 5, 2024, it was recommended by the American Institute for Foreign Study (AIFS) that families looking for a special holiday present for their college-age relatives should think about offering a study abroad opportunity. This institution specializes in cultural exchange and international education.

news.headline: Freddie Mac reports 30-year fixed-rate mortgage average at 6.69%, continuing to decrease.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in McLean, Virginia, Freddie Mac disclosed the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®). According to the report, the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.69%, as per data from Freddie Mac.

news.headline: The Colorado School of Public Health and Initium Health launch campaign to educate on high-THC risks.
news.summary: A groundbreaking campaign has been launched in Denver on December 5, 2024, to raise awareness among Coloradans about the dangers associated with high-potency cannabis. The Colorado School of Public Health has joined forces with their creative partner, Initium Health, to introduce an innovative multimedia initiative. This pioneering program aims to inform the public about the potential risks linked to concentrated forms of cannabis. This marks a significant step in promoting education and understanding around the issue.

news.headline: FirstService declares US$0.25 quarterly cash dividend on Common Shares, payable on Jan 7, 2025 to holders of record on Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 5, 2024, FirstService Corporation (TSX: FSV; NASDAQ: FSV) declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$0.25 per Common Share. The dividend will be paid on January 7, 2025, to Common Shareholders recorded as of December 31, 2024. This dividend is classified as an "eligible dividend" for Canadian income tax considerations.

news.headline: W Hotels opens its first location in Czech capital, Prague, blending old-world opulence with new concepts. Expanding in Europe.
news.summary: W Hotels has recently launched its inaugural property in Prague, marking its entrance into the Czech capital. The new location combines traditional opulence with innovative ideas, encapsulating the city's historical essence while contributing to the brand's progressive growth in Europe. The opening of W Prague signifies a key milestone in W Hotels' expansion strategy, with high-quality images available for viewing. The development showcases W Hotels' commitment to blending heritage with modernity, appealing to a diverse range of visitors.

news.headline: Permuta, IBR & Microsoft to support Marine Corps IT Modernization Prototype Initiative in collaboration with PEO MLB's MITSM team. - 136 characters
news.summary: Tysons Corner, Virginia - On December 5, 2024, Permuta revealed its support for the Marine Corps Manpower IT Systems Modernization (#MITSM) team led by the Program Executive Office for Manpower, Logistics and Business Solutions (PEO MLB) through a prototype initiative.

news.headline: Rubi secures $1 million NSF grant to scale carbon-to-cellulose platform, aiding in decarbonizing manufacturing.
news.summary: Rubi, a company focused on decarbonizing materials manufacturing, has recently been granted $969,961 in funding. This grant, which is given to less than 5% of applicants, will help advance Rubi's mission to make manufacturing more environmentally friendly. The award was announced in San Francisco on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: R-Zero introduces entry/exit counting tech for data on occupancy & utilization at floor, building, and portfolio levels.
news.summary: In San Francisco on December 5, 2024, R-Zero, a prominent smart building technology company, introduced bidirectional people counting systems for entrances and exits. This new feature offers detailed, immediate information on occupancy and usage at various levels - including floor, building, and portfolio. This advancement allows for better monitoring and management of spaces with precise data insights.

news.headline: Stellantis and Zeta Energy partner to create lighter lithium-sulfur EV batteries with up to 50% faster charging speed.
news.summary: A partnership is working towards creating a lighter battery pack that retains the same energy capacity, potentially boosting range, performance, and handling. The technology also aims to increase fast-charging speed by as much as 50%, further enhancing the convenience of owning an electric vehicle. This innovation could revolutionize the EV industry by offering improved efficiency and convenience for users.

news.headline: Coofandy introduces festive deals for Christmas and New Year with promotional event from Dec 6 to Jan 12, part of Q4 2024 campaign.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Coofandy, a designer brand specializing in modern men's essentials, announced their upcoming Christmas and New Year promotional event. The event is scheduled to take place from December 6 to January 12. This promotion is a key component of Coofandy's larger fourth-quarter campaign for 2024, titled "Make...".

news.headline: 1-800-Striper expands to Fort Lauderdale & Miami, offering affordable striping solutions for property owners. Fla, Dec 5.
news.summary: A well-known pavement striping company has recently opened a new franchise in Fort Lauderdale and Miami. This new location provides property owners in the area with cost-effective options for refreshing worn-out parking lots, sport courts, and interior spaces. The franchise was officially launched on October 1, 2024 in Fort Lauderdale, Florida.

news.headline: US 30-yr fixed rate mortgages 6.69% December 5 week vs 6.81% prior week - Freddie Mac.
Global Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) Market 2025-2035 analyzed by ResearchAndMarkets.com, competitive insights on 25 companies like Evove, G2L, PureLi, Summit Nanotech, E3 Lithium.
news.summary: In Dublin, the "Global Direct Lithium Extraction (DLE) Market 2025-2035" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report offers comprehensive insights into the sector, focusing on market dynamics, technological advancements, and growth prospects. By incorporating thorough primary research and in-depth secondary analysis of market trends, competitive scenarios, and technological progress, the report delves into the global Direct Lithium Extraction market landscape.

news.headline: Bitcoin has become the world's 10th largest currency by market cap. Michael Saylor predicts Bitcoin could reach $13 million per coin by 2045.
news.summary: Once regarded with skepticism, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has now surged to become the world's tenth-largest currency based on market capitalization. During a recent interview on Fox Business, Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of MicroStrategy (NASDAQ:MSTR), discussed the company's Bitcoin strategy and made a bold forecast that Bitcoin could hit $13 million per coin by 2045. Saylor highlighted the significant impact Bitcoin could have on the global storage and transfer of wealth, referring to it as "global capital." The potential shift in the traditional long-term store of value from physical assets like real estate to digital assets like Bitcoin was also emphasized.

news.headline: Screenvision Media & Spotlight Cinema Networks launch Cinema Programmatic Alliance nationwide, delivering programmatic access for Q4 movie slate.
news.summary: A unique collaboration has been established between Pecan Pie Productions and On the Wall to provide instant programmatic access for a robust Q4 movie lineup. The partnership involves industry leaders Screenvision Media and Spotlight Cinema Networks. This groundbreaking initiative is set to revolutionize cinema advertising, marking a significant milestone in the industry. The collaboration promises to deliver unparalleled opportunities for advertisers and audiences alike. This move comes amidst growing competition and changing dynamics within the entertainment sector. Stay tuned as this innovative partnership unfolds, ushering in a new era for cinematic advertising.

news.headline: New addition to Intel's board: CEO of Microchip and former ASML chief. Important move for the company.
Western Investment Company (TSXV: WI) closes rights offering, raising $6,296,946.
news.summary: The Western Investment Company of Canada Limited (Stock Symbol: WI) has successfully completed its rights offering, raising a total of $6,296,946 in gross proceeds.

news.headline: Verizon declares quarterly dividend of 67.75 cents per share, payable on February 3, 2025.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE, Nasdaq: VZ) announced a quarterly dividend of 67.75 cents per outstanding share, staying consistent with the previous quarter. This dividend will be paid out on February 3, 2025, to Verizon shareholders who are recorded as such by January 10, 2025.

news.headline: Myant Corp and Coapt collaborate to innovate in assistive tech using textile-based neural interfaces, aiming to transform healthcare.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 5, 2024, a collaboration was revealed between Myant Corp., known for textile computing in healthcare, and Coapt, a leading provider of neural interface technology. The aim is to revolutionize the assistive technology sector. This partnership will primarily work on creating innovative solutions by utilizing their expertise.

news.headline: BIC discloses total voting rights and shares as of Nov 30, 2024, to provide transparent info to stakeholders.
news.summary: As of November 30, 2024, the total number of voting rights and shares comprising the capital have been disclosed.

news.headline: DICK'S Sporting Goods Foundation and LISC grant $1.7 million to upgrade sports spaces in 20 cities, benefitting various sports.
news.summary: An effort is underway to support the refurbishment of sports facilities catering to basketball, baseball, softball, soccer, football, tennis, lacrosse, and volleyball. Notably, community organizations, schools, and parks in 20 various cities and towns nationwide are set to benefit from the allocation of $1.7 million towards this initiative. The funds are designated to enhance infrastructure for a range of popular sports, aiming to provide better recreational opportunities for residents in these locations.

news.headline: French company Vinci disclosed 552,037,806 shares forming capital of €1,474,737,915 and voting rights as of 30 Nov 2024.
news.summary: A French publicly traded company with a share capital totaling €1,474,737,915.00 and its headquarters situated at 1973 Boulevard de la Défense, 92000 Nanterre, France. The company is registered under the Nanterre RCS with the identification number 552 037 806. More information is available on their official website at www.vinci.com.

news.headline: IBA in Belgium to have new gen acquire stake, focusing on growth, value creation, and sustainability.
news.summary: Located in Louvain-la-Neuve, Belgium, on December 5, 2024, IBA (Ion Beam Applications SA), a key player in particle accelerator technology globally, reveals a new endeavor focused on maintaining the entrepreneurial foundation of its shareholders. As per the initiative, a fresh cohort of leaders will secure a substantial indirect ownership in IBA, aligning with the overarching goal of fostering the company's expansion, enhancing its value, and fortifying its long-term viability. IBA's achievements stem from the distinctive blend of entrepreneurial vigor and core share ownership.

news.headline: Details on the total voting rights and shares comprising the share capital released, including important numbers.
BIC reports trading in own shares for November 2024, stay updated with the latest news on the company.
Klépierre SA reports total voting rights and shares as of November 30, 2024.
Quadient SA provides monthly updates on shares and voting rights. Stay informed on the latest numbers.
Aquasight's ACE™ solution approved by MassDEP for CSO notification. Complete AI-driven digital twin suite now in AWS Marketplace.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan on December 5, 2024, Aquasight revealed the expansion of its AI-based digital twin solutions following MassDEP's approval of their ACE™ solution for CSO notification. The suite of solutions includes various technological tools that provide insights for better decision-making. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to enhance their offerings.

news.headline: Alicia Wilson promoted as Managing Director of SEI's Nashville office in 2024, to lead local growth and impact.
news.summary: Specializing in local growth and community impact, SEI, an employee-owned consulting firm, has promoted Alicia Wilson to Managing Director of its Nashville office. This move was announced on December 5, 2024, and highlights Wilson's extensive experience in the company. This change aims to drive further community impact and development under Wilson's leadership.

news.headline: Bitcoin expected to surpass $124K by New Year, targets set at $150K for 2024, consensus.
news.summary: Experts predict that Bitcoin will surpass its current levels by the end of 2024, with price targets reaching as high as $150,000.

news.headline: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Aehr Test Systems investors who suffered losses exceeding $50,000 (Jan 9 - Mar 24, 2024). Partner Josh Wilson urges affected investors to contact him directly.
news.summary: Attorney James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in Aehr between January 9, 2024, and March 24, 2024, to reach out to him directly. If you fall into this category, consider contacting him to explore your potential options.

news.headline: Investors of Match Group with losses exceeding $50,000 between May 2, 2023 - November 6, 2024 can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for legal action.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Match to reach out directly. Individuals who experienced losses exceeding $50,000 in Match during the period from May 2, 2023, to November 6, 2024, are encouraged to contact him to explore their potential courses of action.

news.headline: Investors of Celsius with losses exceeding $75,000 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, Partner of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP specializing in Securities Litigation, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Celsius to reach out to him for a consultation regarding potential options. If you have experienced losses exceeding $75,000 in Celsius within the period from February 29, 2024, to September 4, 2024, it is recommended that you contact Mr. Wilson to explore the available avenues.
